narrative:
Berlin township has 1,732 registered voters, with 47.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 45.4 percentage points.
